summary: Adjusted the opening to hand off more directly from Chapter 7's shared-bed ending and added a light rookery cue at the close to ease the transition into Chapter 9.
edits: Reordered the opening so Mina's body-in-bed viewpoint arrives before the exterior weather description.
Added a brief blanket detail to echo the prior chapter's last domestic image.
Added a single rookery sentence near the ending to bridge toward the next chapter's bird-colony scene.
